system_design.description: 35% - The true separator. Evaluates architectural vision, scalability, fault tolerance, and observability integration.

coding_execution.description: 20% - Focuses on readability, modularity, edge-case coverage, and requirement gathering before typing.

tradeoff_reasoning.description: 15% - Capability to map technical solutions to business reality (Build vs Buy, intentional debt).

behavioral_maturity.description: 15% - Ownership, conflict resolution, and self-awareness of past failures.

communication.description: 10% - Clarity of thought, ability to explain complex concepts simply to non-technical stakeholders.

product_thinking.description: 5% - Understanding of the end-user and metrics-driven development.
